case_title: PACIFIC COAST BANKERS' BANK VS. BYRON WAITE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WAITE, BYRON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC COAST BANKERS' BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAITE, BYRON $45,634.62 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $45,634.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC COAST BANKERS' BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WAITE, BYRON
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-24-2009 CONTINUED TO FEB-26-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORIGINAL CONTRACT DOCUMENTS - (IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT). FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC COAST BANKERS' BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WAITE, BYRON
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-26-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
